title: 基線(R-1 之前)
desc: SoA 非託管陣列、雙緩衝事件驅動 settle、FlagsToState LUT、fast-path 雛形。
desc_en: SoA unmanaged arrays, double-buffered event-driven settle, FlagsToState LUT, fast-path family.

title: R-1 動態 singleton fast-path
desc: 群組可證明只有自己(~70% pop)→ O(1) 解析、跳過群組走訪。
desc_en: group provably size-1 (~70% of pops) -> O(1) resolve, skip the group walk.

title: S2-A 內嵌節點鄰接
desc: channel 資料內嵌進 NodeInfo、消掉 pointer-chase。
desc_en: channel data embedded into NodeInfo, killing the pointer-chase.

title: 重構 + 官網
desc: 邏輯抽進 inline helper:ProcessQueue IL 359→130。
desc_en: logic hoisted into an inline helper: ProcessQueue IL 359->130.

title: hot-path 微優化
desc: NodeConnections 移出 BFS 主迴圈等佈局微調。
desc_en: NodeConnections out of the BFS loop + layout tweaks.

title: P-2/P-3/P-4 事件數剪枝
desc: 節點可證明不變時跳過 enqueue 重算 —— 從源頭刪無謂重算。
desc_en: skip enqueue+recalc when a node provably cannot change -- cut wasted work at the source.

title: 剪枝定版 + 遮罩合併
desc: P-2/3/4 收斂、合併成 bit-packed PruneMask。
desc_en: P-2/3/4 converged; merged into one bit-packed PruneMask.

title: 剖析工具(≈持平)
desc: DEBUG-only 剖析器;hot path native 不變。

title: BFS/DFS + 診斷
desc: native 不變 → 沒改 C# hot path。
desc_en: native unchanged -> no C# hot-path change.

title: 小改
desc: native 不變 → 沒改 C# hot path。
desc_en: native unchanged -> no C# hot-path change.

title: 小改
desc: native 不變 → 沒改 C# hot path。
desc_en: native unchanged -> no C# hot-path change.

title: range-prune + 自我捕捉 locality
desc: class-major 重編號 → 剪枝遮罩變 ID 區間;首次彈出順序自我捕捉。
desc_en: class-major renumber -> prune masks become ID ranges; first-touch pop order self-captured.

title: B1 兩節點成對路徑
desc: 可證明兩節點群組就地解析(占 77% 走訪)。
desc_en: provably-2-node groups resolved in place (77% of walks).

title: .NET 11 + 下降寫回拆分
desc: turn-off 扇出走預過濾端點清單。
desc_en: turn-off fan-out uses a pre-filtered endpoint list.

title: disasm 驅動 codegen 微優化
desc: 讀 JIT x64 找的 5 個 bit-exact 優化。
desc_en: 5 bit-exact opts found by reading the JIT x64 disassembly.

title: turn-off 去重 + GndPwr fast-path
desc: build 時去重 turn-off 端點清單;RecalcNodeFast 特化常見 1/2-GND、0-PWR inline pattern。
desc_en: build-time dedupe of the turn-off endpoint list; RecalcNodeFast specialises the common 1/2-GND 0-PWR inline patterns.
